app.title: SymTrack
app.tagline: Track symptoms • See trends • Share with your care team

newNote.title: New symptom note
newNote.description: Log how you're feeling, what helped, and any treatments or side effects. This makes it easier to spot patterns and share with your care team.
newNote.saved: Note saved. Add another or go to Calendar / Trends.

placeholders.affecting: Describe how the symptom feels and how it impacts your day...
placeholders.remedies: What made it better? Rest, medication, heat, etc.
placeholders.sideEffects: Any side effects from treatment to share with your provider

trends.title: Symptom trends
trends.description: See how a symptom changes over time. Use this to spot recurring patterns, check if treatment is helping, and prepare data to share with your healthcare provider.
trends.emptyNoNotes: No symptom notes yet. Add notes from the "New note" tab to see trends here.
trends.emptyNoData: No data points yet for "{{symptom}}". Add more notes with this symptom.
trends.emptyNeedMore: Add at least one more note for "{{symptom}}" to see a trend line.

notes.title: All notes
notes.description: Browse and filter your symptom notes. Use this to find when a symptom started or to review what you've tried.
notes.empty: No notes match. Add notes from "New note" or change the filter.

modal.noNotes: No symptom notes for this day.
